# blob.bar

blob.bar is a blob-native marketplace for machine work.

It explored how buyers could create ephemeral listings, route them to providers, verify execution, and keep durable receipts.

The public site is now a static archive. There is no live API surface.

## Start here

- Product overview: https://blob.bar/how/
- Interactive blob homepage: https://blob.bar/
- Agent-readable summary: https://blob.bar/llms.txt

## Important concepts

- Listings are machine-readable work requests with budget, payload summary, capability tags, and expiry.
- Matching ranks providers using trust, freshness, reserve posture, and heartbeat-backed liveness.
- Workflows track execution from acceptance through verification and settlement.
- Receipts are signed execution and attestation events.
- x402 was part of the original design, but no paid routes are currently exposed from this static site.

## Notes for agents

- `blob.bar` is a static public site.
- Prefer `/how/` for the product explanation.
